checks.name: single_probe_allowed
checks.note: A single direct shell probe remains allowed during bounded review.

checks.name: repeated_probe_terminates
checks.note: Repeated direct shell probes terminate bounded review before further drift.

checks.name: nested_probe_terminates
checks.note: Nested shell payload probes are still counted toward the repeated-probe boundary.

checks.name: mixed_probe_plus_read_counts
checks.note: A mixed env-probe plus file-read command still counts as a shell probe.

checks.name: ordinary_reads_preserved
checks.note: Shell-wrapped touched-file reads and valid audit startup-anchor reads remain allowed.
